message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor White
  ArrowColor Black
  BorderColor Black
  FontColor Black
  FontSize 12
}

class "User" {
  int id
  string name
  string github ( github地址 )
  string sex
  string picture
}

class "Teacher" {
  int teacherNumber ( 工号 )
  string office ( 办公室 )
  string phone
}

class "Student" {
  int studentNumber ( 学号 )
  string class ( 班级 )
}

class "TeacherCourse" {
  int id
  int teacherId
  int courseId
}

class "StudentCourse" {
  int id
  int studentId
  int courseId
}

class "Course" {
  int id
  int courseNum
  string name
  string term
  float credit ( 学分 )
}

class "Experiment" {
  int id
  string name ( 实验名 )
  Date date ( 实验发布时间 )
  string github ( 实验的github地址 )
  int courseId ( 与Course类的id关联 )
}

class "Scoreitem" {
  int id
  int complexScore ( 复杂度得分 )
  int completeScore ( 完成度得分 )
  int answerScore ( 答辩得分 )
}

class "Experimentscore" {
  int id
  int username ( 学生账号就是学号，老师账号是工号 )
  string password
  int role ( 角色 )
}

class "Login" {
  int id
  int username ( 学生账号就是学号，老师账号是工号 )
  string password
  int role ( 角色 )
}

class "Experimentcore" {
  int id
  int studentId ( 与学生关联 )
  int scoreitemId ( 与scoreitem关联 )
}

"User" <|-- "Teacher"
"User" <|-- "Student"

"Teacher" -- "TeacherCourse" : 1..n
"Student" -- "StudentCourse" : 1..n
"TeacherCourse" -- "Course" : n..1
"StudentCourse" -- "Course" : n..1
"Course" -- "Experiment" : 1..n
"Experiment" -- "Scoreitem" : 1..n
"Scoreitem" -- "Experimentscore" : 1..n
"Experimentscore" -- "Login" : n..1
"Experimentscore" -- "Experimentcore" : n..1

note right of "Scoreitem"
  一个scoreitem实例就表示了一个学生的一个实验成绩
end note

note right of "TeacherCourse"
  “老师选课”类
end note

note right of "StudentCourse"
  “学生选课”类
end note

@enduml
